g.title: Public WAN - Default Route 0.0.0.0/0 via ISP Gateway
The primary networking stack where physical device drivers and system-wide bridges reside.

ol.li: Veth Drivers: Defined in drivers/net/veth.c. Implements ndo_start_xmit to switch context between namespaces.
Namespace Traversal: Packet ingress on Container eth0 is redirected to Host veth_h* via netif_rx() in the sibling context.
Bridge Forwarding: ctr0 populates its Forwarding Database (FDB) by learning source MACs from the veth_h* ports.
NAT Masquerade: Packet headers are modified at the Host eth0 egress to replace Container IP with Host IP (192.168.1.100).
MTU Consistency: All internal virtual interfaces should match physical MTU (1500) to prevent kernel-level fragmentation.

g.title: Public WAN - Default Route 0.0.0.0/0 via ISP Gateway
The primary networking stack where physical device drivers and system-wide bridges reside.
